---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug found during VCD beta or after release
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["triage"]
---

## Summary

<!-- One-sentence description of the bug. -->

## Severity (self-assessed; maintainer will retriage)

- [ ] **P0** — Data loss, crash on launch, unrecoverable save, or hangs the entire app
- [ ] **P1** — Major feature broken (cannot sim a season, recruiting cycle won't close, postseason doesn't fire)
- [ ] **P2** — Significant glitch (UI broken on a screen, wrong stats displayed, calibration off)
- [ ] **P3** — Cosmetic / minor (typo, layout nit, low-impact edge case)

## Environment

- **VCD version:** <!-- Settings → About → Version, e.g. 0.25.0-beta.0 -->
- **Windows version:** <!-- e.g. Windows 11 Home 23H2 -->
- **Save slot ID:** <!-- visible in Save Slots screen, optional -->
- **In-game date / season year:** <!-- if applicable -->

Open File Explorer, paste the path, attach the .log here (drag-drop
into the issue body works). Include the last 200 lines minimum.
